videoJson.name: LaserDisc
videoJson.fact1: This format had moderate success in North America and Europe and found much more success in Japan and Southeast Asia
videoJson.fact2: While this format's video  is stored as composite  analog video signals, the  audio can be stored as  either analog or digital
videoJson.fact3: LaserDiscs are typically  12", but 8" discs were  also produced; CD  Video discs, at 5",  could also carry up to  20 minutes of LaserDisc audio  and video
